headline: AJG Stock Trading at a Discount to Industry at 2.74X: Time to Hold?
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher's organic growth, active acquisitions and capital deployment support long-term expansion despite margin and leverage challenges.

headline: Citizens Maintains Market Outperform on Brown & Brown, Raises Price Target to $78
summary: Citizens  analyst Matthew J. Carletti   maintains Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) with a Market Outperform and raises the price target from $70 to $78.
